attacking_style: Initiates attacks from GC groups on climbs, but lacks sustained power to capitalize. Also opportunistic from early breakaways, finishing strongly in final kilometers when others fade.
team_tactics: Limited team support visible in observations; appears to operate independently, either as breakaway opportunist or testing GC group without visible leadout.
terrain_preference: Performs better in early breakaways on moderate climbs; struggles specifically with high-altitude Swiss-style climbs where sustained climbing power is required.
vulnerability: High-altitude climbs expose weakness in sustained power despite ability to initiate attacks. Gets dropped easily by stronger climbers after making initial moves.
key_patterns: Attacks first from GC groups but lacks power to sustain, dropped by counterattacks (2 instances)
Strong finishing ability when in breakaways, can win from early moves (1 win from break)
Altitude-specific weakness on sustained climbs despite attacking positioning
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 showed clear regression, unable to sustain own attacks and dropped easily despite initiating moves
